info.title: learnwithai
info.description: HTTP API for LearnWithAI, including operational endpoints, UNC authentication flows, and authenticated user profile access.

get.description: Returns the current service health payload.

200.description: Current health details for the API service.

post.description:
Enqueues a sample background job.

Args:
    job_queue: Queue implementation used to submit background work.

Returns:
    A simple acknowledgement when the job has been enqueued.

200.description: Acknowledgement that the demo job was submitted.

get.description:
Redirects the client to the UNC authentication flow.

Args:
    settings: Application settings used to build the callback URL.

Returns:
    A redirect response to the upstream authentication service.

Completes the CSXL callback flow and issues a local JWT.

Args:
    csxl_auth_svc: Service used to validate CSXL tokens and manage users.
    token: Token returned by the upstream CSXL authentication flow.

Returns:
    A redirect to the frontend with a local JWT when authentication succeeds.

Raises:
    HTTPException: If authentication fails or user registration cannot complete.

parameters.name: token

schema.description: Token returned by the upstream CSXL authentication flow.
schema.title: Token

parameters.description: Token returned by the upstream CSXL authentication flow.

200.description: Redirect to the frontend after authentication completes.

302.description: Redirect to the frontend after authentication.

401.description: The provided upstream authentication token is invalid.

500.description: The user could not be registered locally.

get.description:
Returns the authenticated subject's profile payload.

Args:
    subject: Authenticated subject resolved from the bearer token.

Returns:
    A UserProfile model for the API.

200.description: Profile details for the authenticated user.

401.description: Bearer token is missing, invalid, or expired.

put.description:
Updates the authenticated subject's given and family name.

The full display name is recomputed as ``given_name + " " + family_name``.

Args:
    subject: Authenticated subject resolved from the bearer token.
    body: Profile update payload.
    user_repo: Repository used to persist the change.

Returns:
    The updated user profile.

200.description: The updated profile.

401.description: Bearer token is missing, invalid, or expired.

get.description:
Returns courses the authenticated subject is enrolled in.

Args:
    subject: Authenticated subject.
    course_svc: Service used to query courses.

Returns:
    List of courses with active membership.

200.description: Courses where the current user has active membership.

post.description:
Creates a new course and enrolls the caller as instructor.

Args:
    subject: Authenticated subject.
    body: Course creation payload.
    course_svc: Service used to create the course.

Returns:
    The newly created course.

put.description:
Updates an existing course's details.

Only the instructor of the course may update it.

Args:
    subject: Authenticated subject.
    course: Course loaded via DI and course_id path param.
    body: Course update payload.
    course_svc: Service used to update the course.

Returns:
    The updated course with the caller's membership.

200.description: The updated course.

get.description:
Returns the paginated roster for a course.

Only instructors and TAs may view the roster.

Args:
    subject: Authenticated subject.
    course: Course loaded via DI and course_id Path param.
    course_svc: Service used to query the roster.
    pagination: Pagination parameters from query string.
    q: Optional search query to filter by name, PID, or email.

Returns:
    Paginated roster with user details.

200.description: Paginated roster with user details.

post.summary: Add a member to a course
post.description:
Adds a member to a course.

Only the instructor of the course may add members.

Args:
    subject: Authenticated subject.
    course: Course loaded via DI and course_id path param.
    add_member_request: Member addition payload.
    course_svc: Service used to manage memberships.
    user_repo: Repository used to load the target user from the request body.

Returns:
    The newly created membership.

delete.summary: Drop a member from a course
delete.description:
Drops a member from a course.

Instructors can drop anyone. Students and TAs can drop themselves.

Args:
    subject: Authenticated subject.
    course: Course loaded via DI and course_id path param.
    target_user: User loaded via DI and pid path param.
    course_svc: Service used to manage memberships.

Returns:
    The updated membership.

200.description: The updated membership with dropped state.

403.description: Insufficient permissions to drop this member.

get.description: Returns activities visible to the authenticated user.

200.description: Successful Response

post.description: Creates a new In Your Own Words activity.

get.description:
Returns full activity detail including type-specific fields.

Students do not see the rubric.

200.description: Successful Response

put.description: Updates an In Your Own Words activity.

200.description: Successful Response

delete.description: Deletes an activity. Only instructors may delete.

post.summary: Submit a response to an IYOW activity
post.description: Submits a student's response for LLM feedback.

get.description: Returns submissions. Staff sees all active; students see own history.

200.description: Successful Response

get.description: Returns the student's current active submission, if any.

200.description: Successful Response

get.summary: Get a student's full submission history
get.description:
Returns all submissions (active + inactive) for a student on an activity.

Only instructors and TAs may access this endpoint.

200.description: Successful Response

post.description:
Accepts a Canvas gradebook CSV for asynchronous roster import.

Only instructors may upload a roster CSV.

Args:
    subject: Authenticated subject.
    course: Course loaded via DI from the path.
    course_svc: Service used for authorization check.
    roster_upload_svc: Service that creates and enqueues the upload job.
    file: Uploaded CSV file.

Returns:
    The accepted upload job ID and status.

get.description:
Returns the current status and results of a roster upload job.

Only instructors may check upload status.

Args:
    subject: Authenticated subject.
    course: Course loaded via DI from the path.
    course_svc: Service used for authorization check.
    async_job_repo: Repository for loading the async job.
    job_id: Primary key of the upload job.

Returns:
    The upload job status and result counts.

200.description: Current status of the upload job.

post.description:
Submits a joke generation request for a course.

Only instructors may submit joke requests.

get.description:
Returns all joke generation jobs for a course.

Only instructors may list joke requests.

200.description: All joke generation jobs for the course.

get.description:
Returns a single joke generation job.

Only instructors may view joke requests.

200.description: Details of a single joke generation job.

delete.description:
Deletes a joke generation job.

Only instructors may delete joke requests.

get.description:
Returns all registered users for the development login chooser.

Args:
    user_repo: Repository used to load users.

Returns:
    A list of all registered user profiles.

200.description: List of all registered users.

get.summary: Log in as a user by PID (dev only)
get.description:
Issues a JWT for the user identified by *pid* and redirects to the frontend.

This bypasses external UNC authentication entirely. The user must already
exist in the local database.

Args:
    pid: UNC person identifier of the user to authenticate as.
    csxl_auth_svc: Service used to look up the user and issue a JWT.

Returns:
    A redirect to ``/jwt?token=<jwt>`` when the user exists.

Raises:
    HTTPException: 404 when no user with the given PID is found.

200.description: Redirect to the frontend with a local JWT.

302.description: Redirect to the frontend with a JWT.

404.description: No user with the given PID exists.

post.summary: Reset and seed the development database
post.description:
Drops and recreates the database, then inserts development seed data.

Returns:
    A simple status message confirming the reset.

200.description: Confirmation that the database was reset.

ActivityResponse.title: ActivityResponse
ActivityResponse.description: Response for a single activity (shared fields only).

AddMemberRequest.title: AddMemberRequest
AddMemberRequest.description: Payload for adding a member to a course.

AsyncJobInfo.title: AsyncJobInfo
AsyncJobInfo.description:
Nested representation of an async job's current state.

Designed for embedding inside feature-specific response models so
that job lifecycle fields (status, timing) are grouped together
rather than flattened alongside domain data.

AsyncJobStatus.title: AsyncJobStatus
AsyncJobStatus.description: Lifecycle state of an asynchronous job.

CourseMembership.title: CourseMembership
CourseMembership.description: Represents the caller's membership for a returned course.

CourseResponse.title: CourseResponse
CourseResponse.description: Represents a course returned by the API.

CreateCourseRequest.title: CreateCourseRequest
CreateCourseRequest.description: Payload for creating a new course.

CreateIyowActivityRequest.title: CreateIyowActivityRequest
CreateIyowActivityRequest.description: Request body for creating an In Your Own Words activity.

CreateJokeRequest.title: CreateJokeRequest
CreateJokeRequest.description: Request body for submitting a joke generation request.

IyowActivityResponse.title: IyowActivityResponse
IyowActivityResponse.description: Response for an IYOW activity including type-specific detail.

IyowSubmissionResponse.title: IyowSubmissionResponse
IyowSubmissionResponse.description: Response for a single IYOW submission.

JokeResponse.title: JokeResponse
JokeResponse.description: Response for a single joke generation result.

MembershipResponse.title: MembershipResponse
MembershipResponse.description: Represents a membership returned by the API.

MembershipState.title: MembershipState
MembershipState.description: Lifecycle state of a course membership.

MembershipType.title: MembershipType
MembershipType.description: Role a user holds within a course.

PaginatedRosterResponse.title: PaginatedRosterResponse
PaginatedRosterResponse.description: Paginated wrapper around roster member entries.

RosterMemberResponse.title: RosterMemberResponse
RosterMemberResponse.description: A roster entry combining membership and user details.

RosterUploadResponse.title: RosterUploadResponse
RosterUploadResponse.description: Response returned when a roster CSV upload is accepted.

RosterUploadStatusResponse.title: RosterUploadStatusResponse
RosterUploadStatusResponse.description: Detailed status of a roster upload job.

SubmitIyowRequest.title: SubmitIyowRequest
SubmitIyowRequest.description: Request body for submitting a student response to an IYOW activity.

UpdateCourseRequest.title: UpdateCourseRequest
UpdateCourseRequest.description: Payload for updating an existing course.

UpdateIyowActivityRequest.title: UpdateIyowActivityRequest
UpdateIyowActivityRequest.description: Request body for updating an In Your Own Words activity.

UpdateProfileRequest.title: UpdateProfileRequest
UpdateProfileRequest.description: Payload for updating the authenticated user's profile.

UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents the authenticated user profile returned by the API.

tags.name: Operations
tags.description: Health checks and operational endpoints for the service.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Authentication redirects, callback handling, and authenticated identity endpoints.

tags.name: Courses
tags.description: Course management, enrollment, and roster endpoints.

tags.name: Development
tags.description: Routes available only in the development environment for local testing and database management.

tags.name: Instructor Tools
tags.description: AI-powered instructor tools including joke generation.
